Kung Fu Panda 3 (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $143,528,619Details
International Box Office $376,660,606
Worldwide Box Office $520,189,225
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $13,021,775
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $13,899,268
Total $26,921,043
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When Po’s long-lost panda father suddenly reappears, the reunited duo travels to a secret panda paradise to meet scores of new panda characters. But when the supernatural villain Kai begins to sweep across China defeating all the kung fu masters, Po must do the impossible—learn to train a village full of his fun-loving, clumsy brethren to become the ultimate band of Kung Fu Pandas!

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$41,282,042 (28.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.48 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:27.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$140,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,955 opening theaters/3,987 max. theaters, 6.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $198,451,132

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 29th, 2016 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
January 29th, 2016 (IMAX) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: January 23rd, 2016 (Wide) (China)
January 28th, 2016 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
January 28th, 2016 (Wide) (South Korea)
January 28th, 2016 (Wide) (Ukraine)
March 3rd, 2016 (Wide) (Brazil)
Video Release: May 13th, 2016 by Dreamworks Animated Video
MPA Rating: PG for martial arts action and some mild rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2398 (Cert #50127), 11/4/2015)
Running Time: 94 minutes
Franchise: Kung Fu Panda
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Martial Arts, Martial Arts Master, Mentor, Talking Animals
Social setting: Wuxia
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Animation, Oriental DreamWorks, China Film Co. LTD, Zhong Ming You Ying Film
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

When Po’s long-lost panda father suddenly reappears, the reunited duo travels to a secret panda paradise to meet scores of new panda characters. But when the supernatural villain Kai begins to sweep across China defeating all the kung fu masters, Po must do the impossible—learn to train a village full of his fun-loving, clumsy brethren to become the ultimate band of Kung Fu Pandas!

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$41,282,042 (28.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.48 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:27.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$140,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,955 opening theaters/3,987 max. theaters, 6.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $198,451,132

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 29th, 2016 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
January 29th, 2016 (IMAX) by 20th Century Fox

Video Release: May 13th, 2016 by Dreamworks Animated Video
MPA Rating: PG for martial arts action and some mild rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2398 (Cert #50127), 11/4/2015)
Running Time: 94 minutes
Franchise: Kung Fu Panda
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Martial Arts, Martial Arts Master, Mentor, Talking Animals
Social setting: Wuxia
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Animation, Oriental DreamWorks, China Film Co. LTD, Zhong Ming You Ying Film
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
